textContent:
You know when I was just a little boy; I used to do some things. Like eating fresh produce from the countryside, or lying down by the fields.  But due to a turn of events here in our planet, nature has been struggling with our doings. Furthermore, scientists are predicting that the world is going to run out of natural gas in the next 30 or so years due to our inefficient use of resources. Now you might say that, “I’m not a driver, why should I care?”  Whether you drive or not, natural gas runs our daily lives. Without it we wouldn’t have electricity and our economy will surely be in depression. Even though it can have some disturbing effects, natural gas certainly is essential in our society.
	Did you know that almost all the homes in the Philippines use natural gas directly and indirectly. Though we may not notice it, these kinds of resources are the key players in electricity generation. In Luzon alone, 22.9% of electric consumption comes from natural gas from commercial buildings and just ordinary houses. If it hadn’t been for the said resource, an area the size of Isabela, Cagayan and Pampanga will not have electricity. Though Visayas and Mindanao don’t consume natural gas, they do use other types of fossil fuels such as oil and coal.	
	Conversely, our economy is going to suffer a lot if it weren’t for natural gas as all the sectors of the economy need it. Fertilizers consists natural gas like methane, and tractors use processed natural gas to work. Machineries require it to process those which will be transported by trucks, which again, use natural gas. Because of this, the economy’s definitely going to be in a recession just like what is happening in Venezuela, Nigeria, Brazil and etc. 
	Surely, we don’t want to end up like these countries. But how about we tell you a better way of extracting natural gas in a more efficient way? The answer: liquid fracturing or fracking.  In a short as four (4) months, you can get the said resource and sell it. It’s also affordable to execute as it does not need a lot of prerequisites. Not only that, it can be set up anywhere on any region with fossil fuel reserves. Now you may have heard issues about this method referring to water contamination due to negligence but it will not happen if you’ll do it right, right? This may pose a risk to people but the benefits are certainly going to outweigh it. 
We should use our resources to prevent this planet from going down in to flames. Said briefly, the world will be very different without natural gas or any sort of fossil fuels! With you, we can do everything. Do you still want to see the view of the night lights in the city? Do you still want to eat fresh goods from the ranch? Don’t you want to save the world from its impending fall? Well, it’s not too late. We need you to step out of the gray twilight and into the bright sunshine so that we, our friends, and our family will see the stepping stone for the bright future.
title: Revised Persuasive Speech
textContentHtml:
You know when I was just a little boy; I used to do some things. Like eating fresh produce from the countryside, or lying down by the fields.  But due to a turn of events here in our planet, nature has been struggling with our doings. Furthermore, scientists are predicting that the world is going to run out of natural gas in the next 30 or so years due to our inefficient use of resources. Now you might say that, “I’m not a driver, why should I care?”  Whether you drive or not, natural gas runs our daily lives. Without it we wouldn’t have electricity and our economy will surely be in depression. Even though it can have some disturbing effects, natural gas certainly is essential in our society.

Did you know that almost all the homes in the Philippines use natural gas directly and indirectly. Though we may not notice it, these kinds of resources are the key players in electricity generation. In Luzon alone, 22.9% of electric consumption comes from natural gas from commercial buildings and just ordinary houses. If it hadn’t been for the said resource, an area the size of Isabela, Cagayan and Pampanga will not have electricity. Though Visayas and Mindanao don’t consume natural gas, they do use other types of fossil fuels such as oil and coal.

Conversely, our economy is going to suffer a lot if it weren’t for natural gas as all the sectors of the economy need it. Fertilizers consists natural gas like methane, and tractors use processed natural gas to work. Machineries require it to process those which will be transported by trucks, which again, use natural gas. Because of this, the economy’s definitely going to be in a recession just like what is happening in Venezuela, Nigeria, Brazil and etc. 

Surely, we don’t want to end up like these countries. But how about we tell you a better way of extracting natural gas in a more efficient way? The answer: liquid fracturing or fracking.  In a short as four (4) months, you can get the said resource and sell it. It’s also affordable to execute as it does not need a lot of prerequisites. Not only that, it can be set up anywhere on any region with fossil fuel reserves. Now you may have heard issues about this method referring to water contamination due to negligence but it will not happen if you’ll do it right, right? This may pose a risk to people but the benefits are certainly going to outweigh it. 

We should use our resources to prevent this planet from going down in to flames. Said briefly, the world will be very different without natural gas or any sort of fossil fuels! With you, we can do everything. Do you still want to see the view of the night lights in the city? Do you still want to eat fresh goods from the ranch? Don’t you want to save the world from its impending fall? Well, it’s not too late. We need you to step out of the gray twilight and into the bright sunshine so that we, our friends, and our family will see the stepping stone for the bright future.
